Tests that the cosine of negative infinity is NaN using the Math.cos function.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses an assertion to verify the behavior of the `Math.cos` function when passed the value `-Infinity`. The assertion checks that the result of `Math.cos(-Infinity)` is `NaN` (Not-a-Number). This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical edge case to ensure that the `Math.cos` function behaves as expected according to the JavaScript specification. The use of `assert` indicates that this code is likely part of a testing framework or suite.
